items.title_en: Hormuz Minesweeper – Are you tired of winning?
items.title_zh: Hormuz Minesweeper：你厌倦赢了吗？
items.summary_en: Hormuz Minesweeper is an experimental Minesweeper-inspired project that challenges players with nontraditional puzzles; it also probes AI-assisted play and human limits.
items.summary_zh: Hormuz Minesweeper 是一个受扫雷启发的实验性项目，通过非传统的谜题挑战玩家；同时探讨 AI 辅助玩法与人类能力的边界。

items.title_en: Bored of eating your own dogfood? Try smelling your own farts
items.title_zh: 厌倦吃自己的狗粮？试试聞闻你自己的屁
items.summary_en: A humorous take on internal product testing and feedback loops. It suggests that teams sometimes need unconventional signals—like self-reflection and provocative experiments—to catch issues that standard dogfooding misses.
items.summary_zh: 以幽默的方式谈论自家产品测试与反馈循环，建议通过非常规的自我检视和挑衅性实验来发现常规狗粮测试忽略的问题。强调以新角度捕捉盲点的重要性。

items.title_en: Flash-Moe: Running a 397B Parameter Model on a Mac with 48GB RAM
items.title_zh: Flash-Moe：在 48GB RAM 的 Mac 上运行 3970 亿参数模型
items.summary_en: Showcases Flash-Moe, enabling a 397B-parameter model to run on a Mac with 48GB RAM by streaming weights and efficient memory management. This lowers the barrier to experimenting with very large models on consumer hardware and highlights practical tradeoffs in RAM, SSD bandwidth, and latency.
items.summary_zh: 展示 Flash-Moe 如何在仅 48GB RAM 的 Mac 上通过权重流向和内存管理运行 3970 亿参数的模型，降低在家用硬件上试验大模型的门槛，并揭示 RAM、SSD 带宽与延迟之间的实际权衡。

items.title_en: Do Not Turn Child Protection into Internet Access Control
items.title_zh: 不要把儿童保护变成互联网访问控制
items.summary_en: Conflating child protection with broad internet access control can backfire, eroding privacy, civil liberties, and trust in online services. The piece argues for targeted, age-appropriate safeguards rather than sweeping filters.
items.summary_zh: 将儿童保护混同为广泛的互联网访问控制可能适得其反，侵害隐私、自由与对在线服务的信任。倡导针对性、以年龄为导向的防护措施，而非全面过滤。

items.title_en: The three pillars of JavaScript bloat
items.title_zh: JavaScript 体积膨胀的三大支柱
items.summary_en: Unpacks the stubborn growth of JavaScript bundles by naming three core drivers: dependency-heavy ecosystems, bloated toolchains, and runaway runtime payloads. The piece argues for disciplined architecture, selective framework use, and smarter bundling to keep load times and memory in check.
items.summary_zh: 剖析 JavaScript 打包体积为何持续膨胀，指出框架生态、臃肿的构建工具链，以及过多的运行时数据是三大推手。文章呼吁在架构上保持克制、对框架使用更为挑选，并通过更聪明的打包来控制加载时间和内存消耗。

items.title_en: Project Nomad – Knowledge That Never Goes Offline
items.title_zh: Project Nomad：知识永不离线
items.summary_en: Presents an offline-first knowledge initiative designed to keep information accessible during outages or censorship. Emphasizes resilience and portability of knowledge through local-first data strategies.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个离线优先的知识项目，确保在断网或审查环境中也能访问信息，强调通过本地化数据策略提升知识的韧性与可携带性。

items.title_en: Vatican Rebukes Peter Thiel's Antichrist Lectures in Rome
items.title_zh: 梵蒂冈斥责彼得·蒂尔在罗马的‘反基督’讲座
items.summary_en: Covers the Vatican's rebuke of Peter Thiel's controversial lectures in Rome, framing the controversy in ethical and moral terms within the tech community.
items.summary_zh: 报道梵蒂冈对彼得·蒂尔在罗马的争议讲座公开表示批评，讨论科技界的伦理与道德边界。

items.title_en: Windows native app development is a mess
items.title_zh: Windows 原生应用开发是一团乱麻
items.summary_en: critiques the state of Windows native app development, pointing to tooling, API fragmentation, and a difficult developer experience, with suggestions for improvement.
items.summary_zh: 批评 Windows 原生应用开发现状，指出工具链、API 分裂及开发者体验问题，并给出改进建议。

items.title_en: 'Miracle': Europe reconnects with lost spacecraft
items.title_zh: 奇迹：欧洲重新与失落的航天器建立联系
items.summary_en: Reports Europe reconnecting with a previously lost spacecraft, highlighting resilience in space missions and implications for future deep-space communications.
items.summary_zh: 报道欧洲重新与一度失联的航天器取得联系，凸显太空任务的韧性及对未来深空通信的影响。

items.title_en: Tinybox – A powerful computer for deep learning
items.title_zh: Tinybox：用于深度学习的强大小型电脑
items.summary_en: Tinybox packs substantial compute into a compact box, enabling on-device deep learning experiments without relying on the cloud. It targets researchers, hobbyists, and edge deployments seeking serious compute with a small footprint.
items.summary_zh: Tinybox 将强大算力压缩进小巧盒子，支持本地深度学习试验，无需依赖云端。面向希望在紧凑空间内获得高性能计算的研究者、爱好者与边缘部署。

items.title_en: A Case Against Currying
items.title_zh: 对柯里化的反对意见
items.summary_en: Argues that currying can harm readability and debugging in real-world code, especially as function chains grow. The piece advocates pragmatic function design and cautions against overusing point-free styles.
items.summary_zh: 指出在实际代码中，柯里化可能降低可读性和调试性，尤其当函数链日益复杂时。提倡更务实的函数设计，警惕过度使用点-free 风格。

items.title_en: Some things just take time
items.title_zh: 有些事确实需要时间
items.summary_en: Long-term projects—whether research, large-scale systems, or skill-building—unfold at their own pace, and patience often pays off with eventual breakthroughs.
items.summary_zh: 长期项目——无论是研究、大规模系统，还是技能的积累——都按自己的节奏展开，耐心最终会带来突破。

items.title_en: Turns out your coffee addiction may be doing your brain a favor
items.title_zh: Turns out your coffee addiction may be doing your brain a favor
items.summary_en: Notes research indicating caffeine consumption can confer cognitive benefits like improved attention, while also acknowledging potential downsides and the need for moderation.
items.summary_zh: 指出研究表明咖啡因摄入可能带来认知益处，如提升注意力，同时也要注意副作用并保持适度。

items.title_en: More common mistakes to avoid when creating system architecture diagrams
items.title_zh: 创建系统架构图时应避免的常见错误
items.summary_en: Lists common diagram mistakes like over-abstracting, tying diagrams to implementation details, or omitting stakeholders. Provides practical guidelines for diagrams that clearly communicate decisions and constraints.
items.summary_zh: 列出常见的架构图错误，如过度抽象、将图与实现细节绑定，以及忽略相关方。给出清晰传达决策与约束的实用绘制要点。

items.title_en: Revise – An AI Editor for Documents
items.title_zh: Revise：文档的 AI 编辑器
items.summary_en: Introduces Revise, an AI-powered editor for documents focused on streamlining drafting, consistency, and practical writing aid rather than flashy AI theatrics.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Revise，一款面向文档的 AI 编辑器，聚焦提升起草效率与一致性，强调务实的写作辅助。

items.title_en: Professional video editing, right in the browser with WebGPU and WASM
items.title_zh: 在浏览器中实现专业视频编辑：WebGPU 与 WASM
items.summary_en: Demonstrates a browser-based professional video editor powered by WebGPU and WASM, signaling how front-end tech can approach desktop-grade workflows. The project illustrates both the performance hurdles and the potential for cloud-free, privacy-preserving editing in the browser.
items.summary_zh: 展示了一个在浏览器中运行的专业级视频编辑器，借助 WebGPU 与 WASM 实现桌面级工作流的可能性。该项目揭示了性能挑战与在浏览器中实现无云、保护隐私的编辑能力的潜力。

items.title_en: Brute-Forcing My Algorithmic Ignorance with an LLM in 7 Days
items.title_zh: 用 LLM 在 7 天内暴力弥补我的算法无知
items.summary_en: Chronicles a personal experiment using a large language model to fill gaps in algorithm knowledge over a week, with insights on effective prompting and learning strategies. Highlights both potential and limits of AI-assisted self-education.
items.summary_zh: 记录在七天内利用大语言模型弥补算法盲点的个人实验，分享有效提示与学习策略。揭示 AI 辅助自学的潜力与局限。

items.title_en: Floci – A free, open-source local AWS emulator
items.title_zh: Floci：免费开源的本地 AWS 模拟器
items.summary_en: Floci provides a free, open-source tool to emulate AWS services locally, enabling offline development, testing, and CI workflows without touching real cloud accounts. It supports common AWS services and reduces cloud-era friction for developers.
items.summary_zh: Floci 提供一个免费且开源的本地 AWS 模拟器，支持离线开发、测试和持续集成，避免依赖真实云账户。它覆盖常用 AWS 服务，降低云端工作流的门槛。

items.title_en: Nintendo's not-AI, not-a-game toy
items.title_zh: 任天堂的‘会说话花’：不是 AI 也不是游戏的玩具
items.summary_en: Examines a Nintendo talking flower toy that relies on simple interactivity rather than advanced AI, using it to critique AI hype in consumer toys. The piece reflects on what “intelligence” means in everyday devices and how users perceive interactive tech.
items.summary_zh: 分析任天堂的一款会说话的花玩具，强调简单交互而非高级 AI，借此评析消费类玩具中的 AI 含义。讨论日常设备所带来的“智能”感知与互动技术的真实边界。

items.title_en: Show HN: Crack – Turn your MacBook into a squeaky door
items.title_zh: Show HN: Crack – 让你的 MacBook 变成吱呀声的门
items.summary_en: Show HN submission for Crack, a macOS app that uses sound or UI tricks to make a MacBook emulate a squeaky door, illustrating playful hardware-software experiments.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Crack，这是一个让 MacBook 发出吱呀声的应用，展示软硬件结合的趣味实验。

items.title_en: Chest Fridge (2009)
items.title_zh: Chest Fridge（2009）
items.summary_en: Chest Fridge (2009) presents an early hardware-art concept that blends everyday furniture with technology, exploring tangible interface ideas.
items.summary_zh: Chest Fridge（2009）是一件早期的硬件艺术概念，尝试将日常家具与技术结合，探究有形界面的设计思路。

items.title_en: HopTab–free,open source macOS app switcher and tiler that replaces Cmd+Tab
items.title_zh: HopTab – 免费、开源的 macOS 应用切换与平铺工具，替代 Cmd+Tab
items.summary_en: Presents HopTab, a free and open-source macOS app switcher and tiler that offers alternatives to Cmd+Tab for window management and workflow efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 HopTab，一款免费开源的 macOS 应用切换与平铺工具，提供替代 Cmd+Tab 的窗口管理与工作流提升。

items.title_en: Building an FPGA 3dfx Voodoo with Modern RTL Tools
items.title_zh: 用现代 RTL 工具构建 FPGA 的 3dfx Voodoo
items.summary_en: Describes recreating the classic 3dfx Voodoo GPU in FPGA using modern RTL tools, covering design choices, timing challenges, and what modern tooling enables for retro hardware experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 讲述在 FPGA 上用现代 RTL 工具复刻经典的 3dfx Voodoo GPU，讨论设计取舍、时序挑战，以及现代工具如何让复古硬件实验成为可能。

items.title_en: Hide macOS Tahoe's Menu Icons
items.title_zh: 隐藏 macOS Tahoe 的菜单图标
items.summary_en: A simple trick hides macOS Tahoe's menu bar icons, letting you declutter the interface for a cleaner workspace. It illustrates how small UI tweaks can improve everyday usability on modern macOS builds.
items.summary_zh: 一个简单的技巧可以隐藏 macOS Tahoe 的菜单栏图标，帮助用户减少界面混乱。反映出对简洁界面的持续追求以及 macOS 设计选择的权衡。

items.title_en: Cross-Model Void Convergence: GPT-5.2 and Claude Opus 4.6 Deterministic Silence
items.title_zh: Cross-Model Void Convergence: GPT-5.2 与 Claude Opus 4.6 Deterministic Silence
items.summary_en: Notes a phenomenon where different models converge to deterministic ‘silence’ on certain prompts, exploring cross-model boundaries and implications for evaluation and reliability.
items.summary_zh: 记录在特定提示下，不同模型之间出现确定性“沉默”的现象，探讨跨模型的边界及对评估与可靠性的影响。

items.title_en: If AI brings 90% productivity gains, do you fire devs or build better products?
items.title_zh: 如果 AI 带来 90% 的生产力提升，你会解雇开发者还是打造更好的产品？
items.summary_en: Posits a provocative scenario about AI-driven productivity: should teams replace developers or pivot to building higher-quality products? Examines strategic, organizational, and ethical considerations.
items.summary_zh: 提出一个关于 AI 生产力提升的具挑战性情景：是替代开发者还是专注于打造更高质量的产品？从战略、组织与伦理层面展开讨论。

items.title_en: Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust
items.title_zh: Grafeo：用 Rust 构建的高速、轻量、可嵌入的图数据库
items.summary_en: Grafeo is a fast, small-footprint graph database designed to be embedded in applications, offering Rust-based safety and predictable latency. It targets workloads that need graph relationships but can't rely on a separate database service, enabling easier offline or edge use.
items.summary_zh: Grafeo 是一个高速、轻量、可嵌入的图数据库，目标是在应用内直接存储和查询图结构数据，利用 Rust 的安全性和可预测的延迟。它非常适合需要图关系但不愿引入外部数据库服务的场景，如边缘计算或离线应用。

items.title_en: Convincing Is Not Persuading
items.title_zh: 说服力并非劝说力
items.summary_en: Distinguishes convincing from persuading, exploring cognitive biases and how rhetoric can shape beliefs without changing underlying values. Applies to AI, UX, and product strategy.
items.summary_zh: 区分让人信服与劝说，分析认知偏误以及修辞如何在不改变根本价值观的前提下影响信念，与 AI、用户体验及产品策略相关。

items.title_en: Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords
items.title_zh: Ubuntu 26.04 结束46年来的静默 sudo 密码
items.summary_en: Ubuntu 26.04 changes the default by requiring sudo passwords, ending decades of silent elevation. The change boosts security hygiene but may affect onboarding and scripts; users can still fine-tune by policy.
items.summary_zh: Ubuntu 26.04 将默认 sudo 提权改为需要密码，结束长久以来的静默便利。这一改动提升了系统安全，但可能增加开发和运维的耗时与脚本兼容性的问题，用户仍可通过策略进行调整。

items.title_en: $ teebot.dev – from terminal to tee in 6 seconds
items.title_zh: $ teebot.dev – 从终端到 tee 在 6 秒内完成
items.summary_en: Describes a workflow or tool that takes terminal output and quickly pipes it to a tee-like stream, improving quick file writes and log handling in development.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个工作流工具，使终端输出在 6 秒内就能进入 tee 风格的流式写入，提升开发中的日志处理与文件写入效率。

items.title_en: How We Synchronized Editing for Rec Room's Multiplayer Scripting System
items.title_zh: Rec Room 的多人编辑系统如何实现同步
items.summary_en: Discusses how editing is synchronized in Rec Room’s multiplayer scripting environment, covering conflict resolution, latency handling, and real-time collaboration patterns.
items.summary_zh: 讲述 Rec Room 多人脚本编辑系统的同步实现，涉及冲突处理、延迟补偿与实时协作模式。

items.title_en: Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning
items.title_zh: 快速、慢速与人工智能：AI 如何重塑人类推理
items.summary_en: A new paper argues AI systems influence human reasoning by providing quick heuristics and confident outputs, potentially biasing judgments. It examines how AI can both augment and distort thinking, depending on how we interact with it. The research also considers safeguards for education, policy, and design to preserve critical thinking.
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究认为，人工智能系统通过提供快速的启发式和自信的输出，正在潜移默化地影响人类推理，可能引发偏见。AI 的作用既可能提升判断效率，也可能削弱独立思考，取决于人机交互方式。研究还讨论在教育、政策和设计层面需要采取的保障措施，以维护批判性思维。

items.title_en: Show HN: Termcraft – Terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust
items.title_zh: Termcraft：以终端为先的 Rust 沙盒生存游戏
items.summary_en: Termcraft is a terminal-first 2D sandbox survival game built in Rust, showing that rich gameplay can live entirely in a text-based interface. It offers insights into Rust-based game development, performance considerations, and creative UI design under constraints.
items.summary_zh: Termcraft 是用 Rust 构建的以终端为主的二维沙盒生存游戏，展示文本界面也能提供丰富的游戏体验。为关注 Rust 的开发者提供关于性能、UX 与受限环境下的玩法设计的洞见。

items.title_en: Common Lisp Development Tooling
items.title_zh: Common Lisp 开发工具链
items.summary_en: An overview of Common Lisp development tooling, including modern REPL workflows, editors, and package management systems, showing Lisp can stay productive with contemporary tooling.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Common Lisp 的开发工具生态，涵盖现代 REPL 工作流、编辑器和包管理系统，显示 Lisp 在现代化工具下仍具生产力。

items.title_en: Can Programming Be Liberated from the von Neumann Style? (1977) [pdf]
items.title_zh: Can Programming Be Liberated from the von Neumann Style? (1977) [pdf]
items.summary_en: Discusses the Backus 1977 paper that argued for programming paradigms beyond the von Neumann model, laying groundwork for dataflow and alternative computation styles.
items.summary_zh: 讨论 Backus 1977 年的论文，主张超越冯·诺依曼模型的编程范式，为数据流与替代计算风格奠定基础。

items.title_en: Sashiko: An agentic Linux kernel code review system
items.title_zh: Sashiko：一个具代理能力的 Linux 内核代码审查系统
items.summary_en: Presents Sashiko, a Linux kernel code review system that incorporates agent-like automation to assist reviewers, reflecting AI-assisted workflows in kernel development.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Sashiko，这是一个具代理能力的 Linux 内核代码审查系统，融入自动化代理来辅助审查，体现内核开发中的 AI 助力。

items.title_en: Alpha Micro AM-1000E and AM-1200
items.title_zh: Alpha Micro AM-1000E 与 AM-1200
items.summary_en: A look at Alpha Micro AM-1000E and AM-1200, likely a vintage hardware feature, restoration notes, and historical context for early microcomputers.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 Alpha Micro AM-1000E 与 AM-1200 等复古硬件，包含翻新笔记与对早期微机设计的历史背景。

items.title_en: The IBM scientist who rewrote the rules of information just won a Turing Award
items.title_zh: 改写信息规则的 IBM 科学家荣获图灵奖
items.summary_en: Celebrates Charles Bennett, an IBM scientist whose work on the physics of information earned him a Turing Award, underscoring foundational contributions to information theory.
items.summary_zh: 庆祝 IBM 科学家 Charles Bennett 因信息物理的贡献荣获图灵奖，强调他在信息理论方面的奠基性贡献。

items.title_en: Boomloom: Think with your hands
items.title_zh: Boomloom：用手思考
items.summary_en: Boomloom champions kinesthetic thinking with tangible interfaces, illustrating how physical manipulation can augment creativity and problem solving in design and learning contexts.
items.summary_zh: Boomloom 提倡以动手操作进行具象思维，展示物理交互如何提升创造力和问题解决能力，尤其在设计与学习场景中的应用。

items.title_en: Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition
items.title_zh: 给孩子的电子学，第二版
items.summary_en: Second edition expands hands-on electronics education for kids with updated circuits, projects, and microcontroller work, staying approachable for beginners. It emphasizes safe experimentation and building intuition through practical, build-first learning.
items.summary_zh: 第二版扩展了面向儿童的电子学教育，增加了更新的电路、项目和微控制器实践，仍然对初学者友好。强调安全实验和通过动手学习建立直观理解。

items.title_en: My first patch to the Linux kernel
items.title_zh: 我的第一份 Linux 内核补丁
items.summary_en: Shares the experience of submitting your first patch to the Linux kernel, detailing the learning curve, code reviews, and community feedback that come with contributing to the core project.
items.summary_zh: 讲述向 Linux 内核提交第一份补丁的经历，涵盖学习曲线、代码审查与社区反馈。

items.title_en: Bayesian statistics for confused data scientists
items.title_zh: 困惑数据科学家的贝叶斯统计入门
items.summary_en: Offers a practical primer on Bayesian statistics for data scientists who feel overwhelmed by frequentist norms, covering priors, posteriors, and model comparison with intuition and examples. It helps readers reason about uncertainty more naturally.
items.summary_zh: 为对贝叶斯统计感到困惑的数据科学家提供实用入门，讲解先验、后验以及模型对比等要点，并用直观示例帮助理解不确定性。

items.title_en: 25 Years of Eggs
items.title_zh: 25 年的鸡蛋
items.summary_en: A retrospective titled 25 Years of Eggs, exploring how a simple motif or project has evolved over time across culture, food, or technology. Reflects on longevity and the surprises along the way.
items.summary_zh: 回顾“25 年的鸡蛋”这一主题，探讨一个简单概念在几十年中的演变，涵盖文化、饮食或科技领域的变化与惊喜。

items.title_en: Training Center for Maneuvering on Manned Model Ships
items.title_zh: 用于操纵载人模型舰艇的训练中心
items.summary_en: Describes a training center for maneuvering manned model ships, outlining curriculum, simulators, and safety practices for hands-on engineering education.
items.summary_zh: 介绍用于操纵载人模型舰艇的训练中心，涵盖课程、仿真设备与安全规范，强调动手教育的价值。

items.title_en: It's Their Mona Lisa
items.title_zh: 那是他们的蒙娜丽莎
items.summary_en: Examines how a work can be treated as a Mona Lisa for others, highlighting how icon status reshapes interpretation and value.
items.summary_zh: 探讨某件作品如何被视作他人的蒙娜丽莎，揭示偶像地位如何改变解读和价值评估。

items.title_en: A Review of Dice That Came with the White Castle
items.title_zh: 随 White Castle 附带的骰子评测
items.summary_en: A discussion thread reviewing a dice set that came with a White Castle promotion, focusing on design, randomness, and nostalgia. Explores how promotional items intersect with gaming culture.
items.summary_zh: 评测随 White Castle 推广活动附赠的骰子，讨论设计、随机性与情感记忆，以及促销品如何与游戏文化交汇。

items.title_en: Node.js worker threads are problematic, but they work great for us
items.title_zh: Node.js 的工作线程有问题，但对我们很有效
items.summary_en: Examines trade-offs of Node.js worker_threads, acknowledging potential complexities and pitfalls, yet showing they deliver needed parallelism for the authors' use cases. Includes pragmatic patterns that keep them reliable in production.
items.summary_zh: 分析 Node.js worker_threads 的利弊，承认潜在的复杂性与风险，但在特定用例中确实带来所需的并行性，分享让其在生产中稳定运行的实用模式。

items.title_en: Show HN: Time Keep – Location timezones, timers, alarms, countdowns in one place
items.title_zh: Show HN: Time Keep – 将地点时区、定时器、闹钟、倒计时整合在一个地方
items.summary_en: Show HN presenting Time Keep, a unified tool for time zones, timers, alarms, and countdowns, aimed at simplifying time-oriented productivity workflows.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Time Keep，一站式工具整合时区、定时器、闹钟和倒计时，简化时间管理与生产力工作流。

items.title_en: Show HN: Oku – One tab to filter out noise from feeds and content sources
items.title_zh: Show HN: Oku – 一标签筛除信息源噪音
items.summary_en: Show HN introducing Oku, a tool that filters noise from feeds and content sources with a single tab, simplifying content curation.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍 Oku，通过一个标签即可从信息源中过滤噪音，简化内容筛选与发现。

items.title_en: Why Lab Coats Turned White
items.title_zh: 为什么实验室外套变白了
items.summary_en: Explores the history and practical reasons behind white lab coats, including cleanliness, visibility of stains, and safety norms that shaped lab attire.
items.summary_zh: 解读实验室外套为何普遍为白色，涉及清洁、污渍可见性与安全规范等原因。
